description: Applies a dimming overlay SVG mask that focuses attention on specified shapes while dimming everything else
utility: Highlight specific shapes with an attention-focusing overlay and optional customization

arguments.name: shapes
arguments.description: One or more shape variable references to keep in focus

arguments.name: dimness
arguments.description: Custom overlay opacity using fo() expression (default: 0.7)

arguments.name: tint
arguments.description: Custom overlay color using c() or fc() expression (default: black)
